content: Pick the right model for your task — from budget-friendly to advanced. <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> shown. A 20% service fee applies to usage.

comment.text: This text explains the available AI models and associated pricing, including a 20% service fee. It appears as introductory text within tables displaying AI model options in the AI Tools settings. Translators should ensure accuracy regarding pricing terminology.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'OpenRouter pricing' was not translated, leaving it in English, which makes the sentence grammatically incomplete and unnatural in Bulgarian ('Показва се OpenRouter pricing').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Изберете правилния модел за вашата задача — от икономичен до напреднал. Показват се <1>цените на OpenRouter</1>. Прилага се такса за услуга от 20% към използването.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Näytetään <1>OpenRouter pricing</1>' translates to 'Showing <1>OpenRouter pricing</1>', which is grammatically incomplete/awkward in Finnish and fails to convey that the pricing *is* shown or *is being displayed*. More importantly, 'OpenRouter pricing' was left in English instead of being translated, which may be a stylistic choice, but the sentence structure 'Näytetään [X]' is a passive construction that sounds like a command or an incomplete thought in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Valitse tehtävääsi sopiva malli — edullisista edistyneisiin. <1>OpenRouterin hinnoittelu</1> näytetään. Käyttöön veloitetaan 20 % palvelumaksu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The service fee percentage is incorrect. The English text specifies 20%, but the Italian translation says 2%.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Seleziona il modello giusto per il tuo compito, dal più economico all'avanzato. Visualizzato il prezzo di <1>OpenRouter</1>. Si applica una commissione di servizio del 20% sull'utilizzo.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is missing in the Italian translation, and the opening tag <1> is placed incorrectly (it should wrap 'OpenRouter pricing', not just 'OpenRouter').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Seleziona il modello giusto per il tuo compito, dal più economico all'avanzato. <1>I prezzi di OpenRouter</1> sono visualizzati. Si applica una commissione di servizio del 20% sull'utilizzo.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'task' (uzdevums) was translated as 'uzdienai' (diet/meal), which is completely incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izvēlieties pareizo modeli savam uzdevumam — no budžetam draudzīgai līdz avancētai. <1>OpenRouter cenotne</1> parādīta. Uz lietojumu piemērojama 20% pakalpojuma maksa.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Dutch translation uses 'Er is een servicekosten' which is grammatically incorrect (should be 'Er wordt een servicefee van 20% gerekend op het gebruik' or similar), but more importantly, 'van het gebruik in rekening gebracht' implies the fee is *taken from* the usage rather than *applied to* the usage cost. The English 'applies to usage' means the fee is added on top of the usage cost.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kies het juiste model voor uw taak — van budgetvriendelijk tot geavanceerd. <1>OpenRouter prijzen</1> worden getoond. Er wordt een servicefee van 20% gerekend over het verbruik.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'budget-friendly' as 'i qartë për buxhetot e vogla' (clear for small budgets) is inaccurate. 'Budget-friendly' means inexpensive or affordable, not 'clear'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Zgjidhni modelin e duhur për detyrën tuaj — nga i ekonomik deri te i avancuar. <1>Çmimet e OpenRouter</1> tregohen. Një tarifë shërbimi prej 20% aplikohet përdorimit.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains a redundant/incorrect phrase 'Приказана је цена <1>OpenRouter pricing</1>'. It translates to 'OpenRouter pricing price is shown', which is repetitive and grammatically incorrect in Serbian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Изберите правилни модел за ваш задатак — од економског до напреднијег. Приказане су цене <1>OpenRouter</1>. На употребу се наплаћује услужни трошак од 20%.
